cells.cell_text: Type I or type II diabetes

page.content: The first table presents cytokine production in pg/mL across four groups: for the group pVAX-TgCDPK2, the values are IFN-γ at 694.56 ± 76.72*, IL-12(p70) at 334.51 ± 7.52*, IL-10 at 421 ± 23.25*, and IL-4 at 11.75 ± 2.98; for the group pVAX I, IFN-γ is 104.63 ± 28.39, IL-12(p70) is < 15, IL-10 is < 15, and IL-4 is 11.29 ± 4.45; for the PBS group, IFN-γ is 89.14 ± 20.14, IL-12(p70) is < 15, IL-10 is < 15, and IL-4 is 13.17 ± 0.98; and for the Blank control, IFN-γ is 62.14 ± 26.92, IL-12(p70) is < 15, IL-10 is < 15, and IL-4 is 11.67 ± 3.21. The second table details various covariates affecting study outcomes, with the mean study age showing N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.003 (−0.009, 0.014), and a p value of 0.052; study age criteria (under 22 or over 18) also has N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.067 (−0.365, 0.499), and a p value of 0.691; type I or type II diabetes shows N Studies of 5, a Coefficient (95% CI) of −0.05 (−0.74, 0.63), and a p value of 0.825; male (percent) has N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.002 (−0.006, 0.010), and a p value of 0.522; study design indicates N Studies of 6, a Coefficient (95% CI) of 0.062 (−0.483, 0.608), and a p value of 0.767; while duration smoked is not reported, marked as N/A for both Coefficient and p value.
